h1.visual_description: Bold, centered, larger font size, typically used for chapter or major section titles (inferred from document style).

h2.visual_description: Bold, left-aligned, standard body font size or slightly larger, used for sub-sections.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure Caption (Bold, Centered above or below graphic)
Definition List Item (Bullet point starting with bold term followed by colon)

markdown_grammar.citation_format: Author-Date parenthetical (e.g., METI (2021a)) or narrative (e.g., Figure 4.1)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Centered numeric page numbers at the bottom margin (e.g., '30')
